chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. R.A.No. 152 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on CMA 1567/2023. 2. For orders on CMA 1568/2023. 3. For hearing of main case. 05.12.2025. None present for applicant. No intimation is received. This matter is being prosecuted by the applicant himself. None have been appearing on behalf of the applicant for the last three dates of hearing. Today the position is same. It appears that the applicant has lost interest in pursuing this Revision Application, the same is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith pending applications. JUDGE Tufail
